Very rough back-of-the-envelope: about 2,250 post-1982 Iron Maiden shows × about 13,000 average attendees gives about 29 million total attendee-visits; about 1/365 of attendees would be there on their birthday, and a weighted average attendee age around 29 years gives a total combined age close to 2.33 million years.
